name: dev-flow
description: Risk-aware multi-route development orchestration for Claude Code and Codex CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Route development work by size and risk.
interface.longDescription: A dual-host development workflow with strict human gates, route-specific assets, review separation, verification, and safe Git finalization.
